text.p: Anders Grimvall, professor of statistics, Linköping University
Date of birth: March 29, 1945
1967 B.Sc. Pure and applied mathematics, Univ. of Gothenburg
1970 Licentiate Mathematical statistics, Univ. of Gothenburg
1973 Ph.D. Mathematical statistics, Univ. of Gothenburg
1988 Assoc. Prof. (docent) Environmental science, Linköping University
1972-1980 Senior lecturer in mathematical statistics, Linköping University
1980-1996 Senior lecturer and acting professor in environmental science, Linköping University
1996-1998 Senior lecturer in statistics, Swedish University of Agricultural Sciences, Uppsala
1998- Professor of statistics, Linköping University

Author or co-author of more than 100 publications in international periodicals or other peer-reviewed publications. Editor or co-editor of two internationally published books. Long experience of interdisciplinary work ranging from experimental chemistry and environmental management to statistics and probability theory. Main research topics: large-scale turnover of nutrients and halogenated organic matter in soil and water, statistical methods for environmental science and management, and statistical analysis of complex deterministic models.
1992-94 EU project on “Natural halogenation of organic macromolecules in the terrestrial environment”
1995-97 EU project on “Riverine loads of nutrients to the Baltic Sea in an East-West perspective”
1994-97 Industry-funded (EuroChlor) projects on the character and origin of chlororganics in precipitation
1995-97 Industry-funded (AFEAS) project on the global turnover of fluoroacetic acids
1998-2000 EU project on “Regional analysis of subsurface retention of nitrogen”
2000-2003 EU project on “Estimation of human impact in the presence of natural fluctuations”
The following persons have received a doctor’s degree under my supervision:
Roger Sävenhed, 1986
Bo Wigilius, 1988
Bo Lundgren, 1989
Xu Hao, 1991
Gunilla Asplund (Öberg), 1992
Olof Hjelm, 1996 (G. Asplund took over the supervision during the past few months)
Carina Johansson, 1996
Per Stålnacke, 1996
Andrzej Tonderski, 1997
Krzysztof Laniewski, 1998
Lena von Sydow, 1998
Åsa Forsman, 2002
Claudia Libiseller, 2003
I have also co-authored papers in several other doctoral theses, for example the theses of Gunnar Karlsson, Per Sandén, Lotta Andersson, Marianne Löwgren and Lorin Reinelt.
At present I am the main supervisor of the following doctoral students in statistics:
Erik Löfving
Mohamed Hussian
Karl Wahlin
Davood Shahsavani
President of The International Environmetrics Society (TIES) 2004-2006
Coordinator of the research programme ENGO (Environmental Goal Assessment under Uncertainty) sponsored by the Swedish Environmental Protection Agency, 2003-2008.
Associate editor of Journal of Environmetrics
Member of the scientific committees of TIES 2005 (Aug 2005, Beijing, China) and ISI 2007 (Aug 2007, Lisbon, Portugal).
Chairman of the scientific and organizing committees of TIES 2006 (Jun 2006, Kalmar, Sweden)
Laniewski, K, Borén, H. and Grimvall, A. 1998. Identification of volatile and extractable chloroorganics in rain and snow. Environ. Sci. Technol. 32:3935-3940.
Laniewski, K., Borén, H., Grimvall, A. and Ekelund, M. 1998. Pyrolysis gas chromatography of chloroorganics in precipitation. J. Chromatogr. A 826:201-210.
Laniewski, K., Borén, H. and Grimvall, A. 1999. Fractionation of halogenated organic matter present in rain and snow. Chemosphere 38:393-409.
Laniewski, K., Dahlén, J., Borén, H. and Grimvall, A. 1999. Determination of group parameters for organically bound chlorine, bromine and iodine in precipitation. Chemosphere 38:771-782.
Stålnacke, P. Grimvall, A., Sundblad, K. and Tonderski, A. 1999. Estimation of riverine loads of nitrogen and phosphorus to the Baltic Sea, 1977-1993. Environ. Monit. Assess. 58:173-200.
Stålnacke, P., Grimvall, A., Sundblad, K. and Wilander, A. 1999. Trends in the nitrogen transport in Swedish rivers. Environ. Monit. Assess. 59:47-72.
von Sydow, L., Borén, H. and Grimvall, A. 1999. Chloroacetates in snow, firn and glacier ice. Chemosphere 39:2479-2488.
Laznik, M., Stålnacke, P., Grimvall, A., Wittgren, H.B. 1999. Riverine input of nutrients to the Gulf of Riga - temporal and spatial variation. J. Mar. Syst. 23:11-25.
Grimvall, A., Stålnacke, P., Tonderski, A. 2000. Timescales of nutrient losses from land to sea - a European perspective. J. Ecological Engineering 14:363-371.
von Sydow, L.M., Nielsen, A.T., Grimvall, A.B. and Borén, H.B. 2000. Chloro- and bromoacetates in natural archives of firn from Antarctica. Environ. Sci. Technol. 34:239-245.
von Sydow, L.M., Grimvall, A.B., Borén, H.B., Laniewski, K. and Nielsen, A. T. 2000. Natural background levels of trifluoroacetate in rain and snow. Environ. Sci. Technol. 34:3115-3118.
Hoffmann, M. Johnsson, H. Gustafson, A. and Grimvall, A. 2000. Leaching of nitrogen in Swedish agriculture – a historical perspective. Agr. Ecosyst. Environ. 80:277-290.
Stålnacke, P. and Grimvall, A. 2001. Semiparametric approaches to flow-normalisation and source apportionment of substance transport in rivers. Environmetrics 12:233-250.
Libiseller, C. and Grimvall, A. 2002. Performance of partial Mann-Kendall tests for trend detection in the presence of covariates. Environmetrics 13:71-84

Forsman, Å., Andersson, C., Grimvall, A. Hoffmann, M. 2003. Estimation of the impact of short-term fluctuations in inputs on temporally aggregated outputs of process-oriented models. J. Hydroinformatics 5:169-180.

Forsman, Å., Grimvall, A., Scholtes, J. and Wittgren, H. B. 2003. Generic structures of decision support systems for evaluation of policy measures to reduce catchment-scale nitrogen fluxes. Phys. Chem. Earth 28:589-598.
Forsman, Å., Grimvall, A. 2003. Reduced models for efficient simulation of spatially integrated outputs of one-dimensional substance transport models. Environmental Modelling and Software 18:319-327.
Libiseller, C., Grimvall, A. 2003. Model selection for local and regional meteorological normalisation of background concentrations of tropospheric ozone. Atmospheric Environment 37:3923-3931.

Stålnacke, P., Grimvall, A., Libiseller, C., Laznik, M. and Kokorite, I. 2003. Trends in nutrient concentrations in Latvian rivers and the response to the dramatic change in agriculture. J. Hydrology 283:184-205.

Stålnacke, P., Vandsemb, S.M., Vassiljev, A., Grimvall, A., Jolankai, G. 2004. Changes in nutrient levels in some Eastern European rivers in response to large-scale changes in agriculture. Sci. Tot. Environ. 49:29-36.
Vassiljev, A., Grimvall, A., Larsson, M. 2004. A dual-porosity model for nitrogen leaching from a watershed. Hydrological Sciences 49:313-322.
Hussian, M., Grimvall, A., and Petersen, W. 2004. Estimation of the human impact on nutrient loads carried by the Elbe River. Environmental Monitoring and Assessment 96:15-33.

Libiseller, C., Grimvall, A., Waldén, J., Saari, H. 2005. Meteorological normalisation and non-parametric smoothing for quality assessment and trend analysis of tropospheric ozone data. Environmental Monitoring and Assessment 100:33-52.
Hussian, M., Grimvall, A., Burdakov, O., and Sysoev, O. 2005. Monotonic regression for the detection of temporal trends in environmental quality data. To appear in MATCH Commun. Math. Comput. Chem.
.Löfving, E., Grimvall, A. and Palm, V. 2005. Data cubes and matrix formulae for convenient handling of physical flow data. Provisionally accepted in J. Industrial Ecol.

div.p: Refereed conference papers and book chapters

text.p: Forsman, Å., Andersson, C., Grimvall, A., Hoffman, M. 1998. Partial least squares (PLS) regression to extract simple statistical relationships from complex environmental models. SAMO 98: Second International Symposium on Sensitivity Analysis of Model Output, Venice, 19-22 April, 1998.

Stålnacke, P. and Grimvall, A. 2000. Hydrological normalization of nutrient deliveries from agricultural catchments. In: Milliken, G.A. (ed.) Proceedings from Eleventh Annual Conference on Applied Statistics in Agriculture, Apr 25-27, 1999, Manhattan, Kansas.
Grimvall, A. and Stålnacke, P. 2001. Riverine inputs of nutrients to the Baltic Sea. In F. Wulff et al. (eds.) A systems analysis of the Baltic Sea. Springer-Verlag Berlin Heidelberg, pp. 113-131.

Grimvall, A., Wackernagel, H., Lajaunie, C. 2001. Normalisation of environmental quality data. In: L.M. Hilty, P.W. Gilgen (eds) "Sustainability in the Information Society", pp. 581--590, Metropolis-Verlag, Marburg.

Grimvall, A., Forsman, Å., Kronvang, B., Müller-Wohlfeil, D.-I., Wendland, F. and Kunkel R. 2002. Changes in agricultural practices and regional export of nitrogen from land to sea. In: Steenvoorden, J. Claessen, F., Willems, J. (ed.) Agricultural effects on ground and surface waters, IAHS Publ. no. 273.

Forsman, Å. , Grimvall, A. 2002. Linearisation of highly resolved substance transport models by temporal aggregation of model outputs. Proceedings of the International Environmental Modelling and Software Society Conference (iEMSs 2002), Lugano, 24-27 Jun, 2002, p. 375-380.

Wahlin, K., Shahsavani, D., Grimvall, A., Wade, A. and Butterfield, D. 2004. Reduced models of the retention of nitrogen in catchments. In C. Pahl-Wostl, S. Schmidt, A.E. Rizzoli, and A. J. Jakeman (eds.) Complexity and Integrated Resources Management, Transactions of the 2nd Biennial Meeting of the International Environmental Modelling and Software Society, iEMSs: Manno, Switzerland, 2004.

Löfving, E. and Grimvall, A. 2004. A data warehouse for physical flows. In C. Pahl-Wostl, S. Schmidt, A.E. Rizzoli, and A. J. Jakeman (eds.) Complexity and Integrated Resources Management, Transactions of the 2nd Biennial Meeting of the International Environmental Modelling and Software Society, iEMSs: Manno, Switzerland, 2004.

Burdakov, O., Sysoev, O., Grimvall, A., and Hussian, M. 2004. An algorithm for isotonic regression problems. In Neittaanmäki, P., Rossi, T., Majava, K., and Pironneau, O. (Eds.) European Congress on Computational Methods in Applied Sciences and Engineering ECCOMAS 2004., Jyväskylä 24-28 July 2004.

Hussian, M., Grimvall, A., and Burdakov, O. 2004. Monotonic regression for assessment of trends in environmental quality data. In Neittaanmäki, P., Rossi, T., Majava, K., and Pironneau, O. (Eds.) European Congress on Computational Methods in Applied Sciences and Engineering ECCOMAS 2004., Jyväskylä 24-28 July 2004.
Burdakov, O., Grimvall, A., and Hussian, M. 2004. A generalised PAV algorithm for monotonic regression in several variables. COMPSTAT’2004 Symposium, Physica-Verlag, Springer.
Libiseller, C. and Grimvall, A. 2002. Trend testing in the presence of covariates. http://www.mai.liu.se/engo
Grimvall, A. 2004. Semi-parametric normalisation of riverine loads of substances. http://www.mai.liu.se/engo
